channel.title: Pages on Knowckx | 技术、金融、思考笔记
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Knowckx | 技术、金融、思考笔记

item.title: 常用链接
item.description:
这个页面用来整理我常用的开发资源和个人入口，后续会逐步补充。

目前先保留 GitHub 入口，方便查看我的开源项目、实验代码和一些长期维护的仓库。

item.title: 关于我
item.description:
Hi, I’m Zheng Cheng (Knowckx), a senior software engineer with over 8 years of experience building robust, scalable solutions.

My core expertise lies in Go and Python, but I’m a full-stack developer at heart, comfortable with everything from cloud infrastructure and DevOps with Kubernetes to front-end development with React and TypeScript.

Throughout my career at companies like SAP and NetEase Games, I’ve led the development of critical systems, from high-traffic game features serving hundreds of thousands of daily players to infrastructure platforms that secured production environments and saved hundreds of thousands of dollars in cloud costs annually.

I’m driven by a strong sense of product ownership and a passion for turning ideas into reality. This led me to become an independent developer, where I now build my own products, such as an automated stock trading bot and open-source financial tools. I am a firm believer in continuous learning, leveraging AI to boost development efficiency, and sharing knowledge with the community.
